prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn't bigger than your ability—it’s just been growing in your mind because you’ve been avoiding it. The hardest part is starting, not doing. Take a deep breath, commit to just five minutes, and trust that momentum will carry you forward. You’re capable, prepared, and stronger than procrastination. Now go—your future self will thank you. 💪
